summary: Bug fix VERIFIED: Past date validation for appointments. Backend correctly rejects past dates with 400 error. Frontend has double validation: min attribute on datetime-local input, inline error message, toast notification, and blocked navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with past date (1 day ago) returns 400 with 'Impossible de créer un rendez-vous dans le passé' (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with past hour (2 hours ago) returns 400 (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with future date (7 days ahead) succeeds with 200/201 (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with future hour (3 hours ahead) succeeds (PASSED)
Backend: POST /api/appointments/ with exact current time returns 400 (edge case - PASSED)
Frontend: datetime-local input has 'min' attribute set to current datetime (PASSED - value: 2026-03-22T00:46)
Frontend: Error message 'La date et l'heure du rendez-vous doivent être dans le futur' appears with data-testid='datetime-past-error' (PASSED)
Frontend: Toast error appears when clicking 'Suivant' with past date (PASSED)
Frontend: Navigation blocked on Step 2 when past date entered (PASSED)
Frontend: Navigation to Step 3 allowed when future date entered (PASSED)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend appointments.py line 92-96: Correctly checks if start_dt <= now_utc() and raises HTTPException 400
Frontend AppointmentWizard.js line 463-471: Dynamic min attribute computed from new Date()
Frontend AppointmentWizard.js line 475-479: Inline error message with data-testid='datetime-past-error'
Frontend AppointmentWizard.js line 208-211: validateStep case 2 checks new Date(formData.start_datetime) <= new Date() and shows toast
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - test appointments created and deleted during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Past date validation bug fix fully verified. Backend uses UTC comparison (start_dt <= now_utc()). Frontend has triple validation: 1) min attribute prevents browser date picker from selecting past dates, 2) inline red error message appears below input when past date detected, 3) validateStep blocks navigation and shows toast. Wizard route is /appointments/create.

verified_features.backend_past_date_rejection: POST /api/appointments/ with past date returns 400 with French error message
verified_features.frontend_min_attribute: datetime-local input has min attribute dynamically set to current datetime
verified_features.frontend_inline_error: Red error message with data-testid='datetime-past-error' appears below input
verified_features.frontend_toast_error: Toast notification 'La date et l'heure du rendez-vous doivent être dans le futur' shown
verified_features.frontend_navigation_blocked: Suivant button click does not navigate to Step 3 when past date entered

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Il est possible de créer un rendez-vous dans le passé
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Double validation: Frontend (min attribute + error message + blocked navigation) AND Backend (400 rejection if start_datetime <= now UTC)
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Both frontend and backend correctly prevent past date appointments
